rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong IDE/developer-tooling experience and polyglot background, offset by a lack of recent Java/Kotlin/Spring experience. The prestigious employer swaps (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog) are never invoked as a positive signal, and no new concern or score shift tracks the changed company names. The wording differs only as ordinary run-to-run paraphrase.
